text:
Created attachment 255554
Patch for libzip

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)
